data.title: RF Industries' stock surges nearly 21% post Q4 fiscal 2025 earnings release, with net sales up 23% to $22.7 million.
data.description: RF Industries Ltd. saw a significant increase in their shares by 20.94% in after-hours trading, reaching $8.72, following the release of their fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings. The San Diego-based company reported a 23% rise in net sales for Q4, totaling $22.7 million, compared to $18.5 million in the previous year and $19.8 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2025. The company also revealed a consolidated net income of $174,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, contrasting with a net loss of $238,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, in the same quarter of the prior year. Additionally, RF Industries disclosed a non-GAAP net income of $2.1 million, equivalent to 20 cents per diluted share.

data.title: Nasdaq falls 1% as tech stocks decline; Fear & Greed Index at 'Neutral' zone. Chip stocks like AVGO, NVDA, and MU take hit. Markets cautious pre-Trump tariffs ruling. Bank of America Corp & Citigroup Inc report earnings.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in overall market sentiment, shifting to the "Neutral" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw a decline, particularly the Nasdaq Composite which dropped by 1% as investors exercised caution regarding an upcoming Supreme Court ruling on the legality of President Donald Trump's tariffs. Chip stocks experienced significant drops, with Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO), Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA), and Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MU) all closing lower on Wednesday. Additionally, Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC) and Citigroup Inc. reported earnings for the day. Please refer to Benzinga.com for more detailed information.

data.title: At CES 2026, Tineco shines as a top smart home brand with innovative cleaning solutions, showcasing leading evolution in home cleaning.
data.description: During CES 2026, Tineco, a prominent brand in the home cleaning sector, stood out by emphasizing its intelligent cleaning solutions that blend design, performance, and practicality. This approach has solidified Tineco's position as a leader in redefining home cleaning standards, garnering various accolades. The brand's innovative products were showcased at CES, underscoring its commitment to seamlessly integrating advanced technologies into households.

data.title: Goldman Sachs to report $11.65 earnings per share on $13.79 billion revenue for the quarter, shares trade at $928.99.
data.description: Today, U.S. stock futures are showing a mixed trend, with investors keeping an eye on specific stocks. Ahead of the market opening, there is anticipation for Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS) to announce its quarterly earnings at $11.65 per share, with an expected revenue of $13.79 billion. In after-hours trading, Goldman Sachs' shares dipped by 0.4% to $928.99. Another stock attracting attention is Calavo Growers Inc. (NASDAQ: ), with more details accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Senate Banking delays crypto bill markup as negotiations continue for bipartisan support to advance key regulations.
data.description: Chairman Tim Scott of the Senate Banking Committee has emphasized the necessity for continued negotiations to secure bipartisan backing for a crucial bill concerning cryptocurrency regulations before it can progress further.

data.title: Neutral DOGE consolidation at $0.14; RSI at 54.49. Forecasting $0.16 by Feb 2026 based on TA; potential breakout or decline within 4 weeks.
data.description: The current price of Dogecoin remains stable at $0.14, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 54.49. Analysis indicates a possible movement towards either a resistance level of $0.16 or a support level of $0.12 in the next four weeks, based on the existing momentum.

data.title: Senator Lummis predicts delay in crypto market changes due to disagreements over stablecoin reward provisions in the CLARITY Act.
data.description: The inclusion of stablecoin reward provisions in the CLARITY Act has sparked disagreements among stakeholders in the banking and crypto industries, potentially leading to delays in passing the bill. With conflicting agendas being pushed by different groups, the future of the legislation is uncertain. This development comes amidst growing concerns and discussions related to stablecoins, highlighting the complexity and challenges involved in regulating this sector. The competing interests at play have made it difficult to reach a consensus, with the issues at hand having significant implications for the industry. The stalemate could hinder progress on the bill, which is seen as crucial for addressing regulatory gaps in the rapidly evolving crypto landscape. As debates continue, finding common ground will be essential to move forward and ensure effective governance in this space.

data.title: Zoomlion integrates AI with construction machinery to advance intelligent manufacturing, focusing on industrial internet, big data, and cloud computing.
data.description: In Changsha, China, on January 15, 2026, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (1157.HK) is leading innovation by fusing AI with construction equipment, the industrial internet, big data, and cloud computing. This initiative aims to drive intelligent transformation in the industry.
